_comment: Example settings.json wiring for the eleven hook scripts (7 original + 4 added 2026-07-02). Place at .claude/settings.json or ~/.claude/settings.json. Replace $CCC with the absolute path to your claude-code-context checkout. git-prepare-commit-msg.sh is a git hook, not a Claude hook — install it separately per its header.
_matcher_note: Since v2.1.195 (June 2026) hyphenated matchers exact-match instead of substring-matching: 'mcp__foo-bar' must be written 'mcp__foo-bar__.*'. The plain tool-name matchers below are unaffected.

permissions._comment: Mechanical backstop for the action gate: pushes and destructive git always prompt, even under acceptEdits. Deny rules for the worst cases.

_anti_patterns_honored: ANTI_PATTERNS.md A1 — no PostToolUse hook invokes Claude; dogfood-suite-gate guards re-entry via stop_hook_active
ANTI_PATTERNS.md A5 — rm-rf guard even in non-YOLO sessions
ANTI_PATTERNS.md A11 — hooks redirect stderr; test with --debug
_opt_in_notes: dogfood-suite-gate.sh is a no-op unless the project defines .claude/dogfood.cmd (D6 green-on-main rule)
py-pip-guard.sh is a no-op on machines without the py launcher (Linux/macOS containers)
